headline: **MLB Daily Roundup: May 13, 2026**
article:
The Los Angeles Angels fell short in Cleveland, dropping a 2-3 decision to the Guardians. Angel Martínez led the Angels' offense with 2 hits, including a home run. Slade Cecconi pitched 4 strong innings for the Angels.

Several key players are dealing with injuries, impacting their teams' lineups. The Athletics placed Brooks Kriske on the 15-day injured list due to right shoulder impingement. The Miami Marlins placed Robby Snelling on the 15-day injured list with a left elbow UCL sprain. The New York Mets placed Francisco Alvarez on the 10-day injured list with a right meniscus tear. The Cincinnati Reds placed Rhett Lowder on the 15-day injured list with right shoulder pain. The Los Angeles Angels placed Drew Pomeranz on the 15-day injured list with left elbow inflammation. The Baltimore Orioles placed Dylan Beavers on the 10-day injured list retroactive to May 11, 2026, with a right oblique strain and Grant Wolfram on the 15-day injured list retroactive to May 9, 2026, with a low back strain. The Athletics also placed Jacob Wilson on the 10-day injured list retroactive to May 11, 2026, with a left shoulder dislocation.

Several teams made notable roster moves. The Arizona Diamondbacks acquired Jose Requena from the Los Angeles Dodgers in exchange for Alek Thomas. The Cleveland Guardians acquired Patrick Bailey from the San Francisco Giants in a trade that included LHP Matt Wilkinson and other considerations. The Baltimore Orioles acquired Enyel Garcia and Maicol Lauriano from the Philadelphia Phillies in exchange for cash.

top_news.title: **Angels Fall Short in Cleveland**
top_news.summary: The Los Angeles Angels dropped a 2-3 decision to the Cleveland Guardians in their latest matchup. Angel Martínez led the Angels' offense with 2 hits, including a home run, while Slade Cecconi pitched 4 strong innings for the Angels.

top_news.title: **Yankees Take Down Orioles 6-2**
top_news.summary: The New York Yankees secured a 6-2 victory over the Baltimore Orioles, with Will Warren earning the win after pitching 5.2 innings and striking out 6 batters. Trent Grisham led the Yankees' offense with a home run and 3 RBIs.

top_news.title: **Nationals Take Down Reds 10-4**
top_news.summary: The Washington Nationals secured a decisive victory over the Cincinnati Reds, winning 10-4. Daylen Lile led the Nationals' offense with a strong performance, hitting 3 home runs and driving in 4 runs.

top_news.title: **Rockies Fall to Pirates in 1-3 Showdown**
top_news.summary: The Colorado Rockies suffered a 1-3 loss to the Pittsburgh Pirates, with Paul Skenes earning the win after 8.0 IP, 10 K, 0 ER, 0 BB, 2 H. Gregory Soto secured the save for the Pirates.

top_news.title: **Yankees Fall to Orioles in Dominant 7-0 Loss**
top_news.summary: The Baltimore Orioles secured a convincing 7-0 victory over the New York Yankees, with Adley Rutschman and Coby Mayo leading the Orioles' offense. Kyle Bradish pitched a strong game for the Orioles, while Pete Alonso was the only Yankees player to have a notable performance.

top_news.title: **Guardians Edge Angels 4-2**
top_news.summary: The Cleveland Guardians secured a 2-4 victory over the Los Angeles Angels in their recent matchup. Impact players for the Guardians included Patrick Bailey, while Zach Neto and Angel Martínez stood out for the Angels.

top_news.title: **Athletics RHP Brooks Kriske Lands on 15-Day IL**
top_news.summary: Athletics right-handed pitcher Brooks Kriske has been placed on the 15-day injured list due to a right shoulder impingement. This move aims to give Kriske time to recover and return to the field.

top_news.title: **Diamondbacks Acquire Requena in Trade**
top_news.summary: The Arizona Diamondbacks have acquired outfielder Jose Requena in a trade with the Los Angeles Dodgers. Requena joins the Diamondbacks in exchange for center fielder Alek Thomas.
